note: Explorer Trinity banner: gain CTO discovery-engine content INSIDE the expandable details body. The collapsed banner view (TRINITY IS LIVE label + Discovery Engine heading + Registry magenta indicator + intro paragraph + Details toggle) is unchanged so the explorer header stays compact. After expanding Details, the existing eight-row metadata grid (AOI / Block / Capsule / TXID / Proof SHA-256 / Merkle Root / Pipeline / Status) and the existing public-cryptographic-timestamp note are also unchanged. Three new blocks appended INSIDE #trinityProofBody below the existing note: (1) green-bordered SIX-STAGE PIPELINE ordered list (Generate hypotheses → Filter → Review → Plan heavy work → Package → Seal on SOST); (2) magenta-bordered SIX OPERATOR-ENFORCED RULES ordered list (no consensus touch / no validated-discovery claim / always verifiable bundles / register only milestones / Useful Compute rewards off / public framing utility-first); (3) green-bordered one-line summary 'Trinity is SOST's first strong use case: turning autonomous digital research into publicly verifiable proof' with a link to sost-trinity.html. HTML balance audited (section / div pairs match after edit). NO consensus / RPC / node / miner / wallet / wire-format change. NO new endpoints.
